channel.title: Curriculum Vitae (Gihyeon Jeon, 전기현) on 전기현 Curriculum Vitae
channel.description: Recent content in Curriculum Vitae (Gihyeon Jeon, 전기현) on 전기현 Curriculum Vitae

item.title: Curriculum Vitae (Gihyeon Jeon, 전기현)
item.description:
Education & Employment

2025.03. - Present | Postdoctoral Researcher
Computational Science Research Center, Korea Institute of Science and Technology (KIST)
2021.03. - 2025.02. | Ph.D. in Mathematics
Kyungpook National University (Adviser: Prof. Sunghwan Moon)
2019.03. - 2021.02. | M.S. in Mathematics
Kyungpook National University (Adviser: Prof. Sunghwan Moon)
2012.03. - 2019.02. | B.S. in Physics with a Minor in Mathematics
Kyungpook National University (Military Service, 2013.04 - 2015.01)

item.title: Curriculum Vitae (Gihyeon Jeon, 전기현)
item.description:
Publications

Journal articles

  1. Gihyeon Jeon1 and Gyeongha Hwang
    SelfPAT: Self-supervised joint estimation of sound speed and initial pressure in PAT
    Submitted
  2. Gihyeon Jeon1, Nyan Htet Naing1, and Gyeongha Hwang
    SelfPMRI: Self-supervised joint sensitivity maps estimation and image reconstruction in parallel MRI
    Submitted
  3. Gyeongha Hwang, Sunghwan Moon, Dabin Park$\dagger$, and Gihyeon Jeon$\dagger$
    Implicit learning to determine variable sound speed and the reconstruction operator in photoacoustic tomography
    Accepted, Applied Mathematics in Science and Engineering
  4. Sanghyun Kim1, Gihyeon Jeon1, Seungwoo Hwang, Jiho Lee, Jisu Jung, Seungwu Han, Sungwoo Kang
    Are diffusion models ready for materials discovery in unexplored chemical space?
    Patterns (Cell Press sister journal)
  5. Gihyeon Jeon1$\dagger$
    Range description for an attenuated conical Radon transform with fixed central axis and opening angle
    Applicable Analysis 104.16 (2025), p. 3278-3290.
  6. Souvik Roy, Gihyeon Jeon, and Sunghwan Moon
    Radon transform with Gaussian beam: Theoretical and numerical reconstruction scheme
    Applied Mathematics and Computation 452 (2023), p. 128024.
  7. Gihyeon Jeon1 and Sunghwan Moon
    Singular value decomposition of the attenuated conical Radon transform with a fixed central axis and opening angle
    Integral Transforms and Special Functions 32.10 (2021), p. 812-822.

Books

  1. Gihyeon Jeon1 and Daesick Ryu1
    Julia Programming: Computational Science, Statistical Analysis, Deep Learning, and Data Visualization (written in Korean, Korean title: 줄리아 프로그래밍: 수리 계산, 통계 분석, 딥러닝, 데이터 시각화를 위한)
    bjpublic, 2024. isbn: 9791165922757.
